summary: Pay Fees Integration on Student Dashboard - ALL FEATURES WORKING. Tested student login via OTP (9876543210/1111), verified 'Pay Your Fees' section appears with correct batch name ('Coding Basics - Batch 1'), course ('coding'), and amount (₹5,000). Pay Now button is visible, clickable, and opens Cashfree modal. The 'Broken Link' error is EXPECTED (preview domain not whitelisted).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Login flow, Pay Fees section display, Pay Now button, Cashfree modal all working)

seed_data_creation: Test student with phone 9876543210 already exists with pending payment of ₹5,000 for 'Coding Basics - Batch 1' batch
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pay Fees feature is fully integrated into student dashboard (MyBookingsPage.jsx). After OTP login, students see their pending payment card at top of dashboard with batch name, course, and amount. Pay Now button triggers Cashfree Drop-in checkout modal. The 'Broken Link' error in preview is expected - production domain needs whitelisting in Cashfree merchant dashboard.

login_flow.details: OTP login with phone 9876543210 and OTP 1111 works correctly, redirects to /my-bookings dashboard

pay_fees_section.details: Green card displays at top with batch name, course, amount (₹5,000), and Pay Now button

pay_now_button.details: Button has data-testid='pay-now-btn', is clickable, triggers Cashfree SDK checkout

cashfree_modal.details: Modal opens showing 'Broken Link' error because preview domain not whitelisted - this is expected behavior per testing requirements

bookings_section.details: Shows below payment card with Upcoming (2), Completed (0), Archived/Cancelled (3) tabs

expected_cashfree_error_explanation.error_message: Broken Link! https://team-onboarding-hub-1.preview.emergentagent.com/ is not enabled or approved
expected_cashfree_error_explanation.reason: Preview domain not whitelisted in Cashfree merchant dashboard
